description: Validates that promoted terraform-architect subagent correctly loads SKILL.md and returns content. Tests that 108-line agent content is reachable after promotion to ds-domains:terraform skill.
input_prompt: use terraform-architect to explain the risks of using count vs for_each for resource collections
notes: Claude invokes the terraform-architect subagent which loads SKILL.md from ds-domains:terraform. Response explains that count indexes are positional — removing an item shifts all higher items, triggering destroy+recreate — while for_each keys are stable strings.
